title: Skillmatics Storybook Art Kit - Create Adventure Stories, DIY Craft & Writing Kit with 300+ Stickers, Scrapbooking & Journal Activity, Gifts for Kids Ages 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10
features: CREATE YOUR OWN STORYBOOKS: Step into a world of adventures and endless imagination with Skillmatics' Storybook Art Kit! This all-in-one kit gives kids everything they need to become authors, from writing prompts and vocabulary lists to colourful stickers, markers, and hardbound books to bring their stories to life.
INCLUDES: 2 hardbound storybooks, 100+ colourful stickers, 50+ DIY stickers, 5 writing prompts, 13 vocabulary lists, 8 markers, 2 pencils, and an instruction manual.

WRITE YOUR OWN ADVENTURE: Inspire young writers with everything they'll need to get their ideas down on paper including writing prompts to think of new ideas, vocabulary lists to find the new words to express themselves, and stickers and markers to bring their stories to life.

SPARKS CREATIVITY: Designed for budding artists and storytellers, this kit encourages both boys and girls to embark on an exciting creative journey, helping them express themselves through words and art.
EASY & FUN TO USE: Simple yet exciting! With guided tools and vibrant materials, kids can dive right into creating their own adventure stories.

PERFECT GIFT FOR AGES 5 TO 10: A wonderful gift that promises hours of imaginative fun. With easy-to-follow instructions, kids will explore the magic of storytelling while developing essential skills.
DEVELOPS ESSENTIAL SKILLS: Enhances creativity, strengthens communication, builds vocabulary, and encourages independent thinking.
SCREEN-FREE FUN & INDEPENDENT PLAY: A perfect alternative to screen time, this hands-on activity engages kids in independent play, sparking creativity and fostering a love for storytelling.
